name: Agent-ready task
about: A scoped, self-contained task written so a coding agent can pick it up and implement it without needing a live conversation for context.
title: '[Agent] '
labels: 'coding-agent-ready'
assignees: ''

---

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences: what's broken or missing, and why it matters. -->

## Context

<!-- Background needed to understand the "why" — link to the feature/plan this came out of, prior decisions, related tickets. -->

<!-- What happens today. Cite exact file:line references where possible. -->

## Expected Behavior / Proposed Change

<!-- What should happen instead. Be specific enough that no follow-up question is needed to start coding. If there are multiple valid approaches, state the recommended one and why. -->

## Files Likely Involved

<!-- Concrete file paths (not exhaustive — the agent should still explore) to anchor the search. -->

## Acceptance Criteria

<!-- Checklist of observable, testable outcomes. -->

## Out of Scope

<!-- Explicitly excluded work, so the agent doesn't scope-creep. -->
